SuccessPage.title: Order
SuccessPage.description: Your session has been converted to a pending order. Please follow the instructions below to verify your purchase.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps:
nextSteps.step1: Click the VERIFY ON WHATSAPP button below.
nextSteps.step2: Send the pre-filled message without modifying the Order ID.
nextSteps.step3: Attach a screenshot of your Instapay / Wallet transfer as proof.

SuccessPage.whatsappMessage: Hello TechWorld! My Order ID is {code}. I'm attaching my payment receipt for verification.
